programs.title: American Underdog
programs.desc: The inspirational true story of Kurt Warner, who overcomes years of challenges and setbacks to become a two-time NFL MVP, Super Bowl champion, and Hall of Fame quarterback. Just when his dreams seem all but out of reach, it's only with the support of his wife, Brenda, and the encouragement of his family, coaches and teammates that Warner perseveres and finds the strength to show the world the champion that he already is.

programs.title: The Last Thing She Said
programs.desc: A young woman befriends an elderly cleaning lady who works in her corporate office. However, their relationship soon turns uneasy, then dangerous, when she rejects a date request from the woman's awkward, middle-aged son.

programs.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programs.desc: A 40-year-old disappears on the second night of a cruise, her family is left searching for answers, and it ends up changing the way missing persons are reported at sea.

programs.title: Cruise Ship Killers
programs.desc: A sous chef aboard a cruise ship leaves her shift unexpectedly and is never seen again; the pressure of the kitchen may have pushed her to take her own life, or maybe there was foul play; the clues could help solve the mystery.

programs.title: Finally Caught
programs.desc: Sydney Loofe's vibrant life takes a tragic turn in November 2017 when she enters the world of online dating and unknowingly crosses paths with Bailey Boswell and Aubrey Trail; as their second date approaches, the couple hatches a sinister plan.

programs.title: Finally Caught
programs.desc: Denita Smith, a 25-year-old graduate student in North Carolina, is murdered on January 4, 2007; before her tragic death, Shannon Crawley, who had a complicated history with Denita's fiance, Jermeir Stroud, became extremely jealous.
